title: cephalophilon runcinatum
intro: Cephalophilon runcinatum, also known as 'Lion's Mane Mushroom', is a type of edible fungus that belongs to the genus of Armillaria. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of consuming Cephalophilon runcinatum include improved cognitive function, reduced anxiety and depression, and enhanced immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder, and can also be added to soups and other dishes, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and preparations.
